GPT-5.5 reviewer approved branch gpu-byte-multiplier-validation with no findings
what_changed: Added internal finite numeric validation for kv_gpu_bytes_per_payload_byte in engine-ready request construction.
Reused the same multiplier validation from DocumentKVService initialization and DocumentKVWorkflow engine handoff overrides.
Extended engine and workflow tests to reject bool, non-numeric, NaN, infinity, and negative GPU byte multipliers.
pr-evidence/gpu-byte-multiplier-validati.why: GPU memory estimates feed admission control and vLLM/SGLang handoff metadata. Validating the multiplier consistently at each public serving path prevents NaN, infinity, booleans, or late TypeError/ValueError failures from corrupting serving-boundary accounting.
